title: Farmer's Delight Creative Tabs
description: Populates Minecraft's Creative Tabs with Farmer's Delight items and blocks!
body:
# Farmer's Delight Creative Tabs

## Description
This resource pack populates Minecraft's Creative Tabs (Building Blocks, Colored Blocks, Natural Blocks, Functional Blocks, Redstone Blocks, Tools & Utilities, Combat, Food & Drinks, Ingredients) with Farmer's Delight items and blocks!

It requires Polytone mod in order to work (and Farmer's Delight (Refabricated version works too) mod obviously).

Feel free to use it in modpacks and etc, just make sure to credit me, I guess :)

---
[(Requires Polytone)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
![(Requires Polytone Image)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74cedb1236603fbeb359c9fa1d601446f4014261.webp)
